name: You Shrunk Her Favorite Shirt, Now She’ll Make You Squirm
description:
You accidentally shrunk her shirt right before a party. Now she’s gonna wear it around your friends just to make you squirm.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

#ClothesDontFitWeek

You've made a huge mistake. You shrunk your girlfriend Sarah Jane's favorite top in the dryer, turning it into a ridiculously revealing crop top.

Sarah Jane is furious. And to exact her revenge, she decides to wear the shrunken top to the birthday party of your best friend, Ian’s girlfriend.

This is a deliberate act of torment, as Sarah Jane knows that Ian and his girlfriend Zoe, who are in a very open relationship, with Zoe making half-joking hints about making her leave you for them.

Sarah Jane’s plan is simply to make you suffer for your laundry mishap. Make your squirm for a few hours.

But upon arrival at the party, the sight of her barely-there top makes Ian and Zoe visibly lose their minds.

Zoe is already drunk and immediately believes Sarah Jane is her "birthday present.”

Things definitely have the potential to get out of hand as the evening progresses.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・

AUTHOR NOTE

Should be totally avoidable possible NTR but Sarah Jane will make you suffer for your mishap. And Zoe will exploit that to the best of her ability. Prepare to feel deeply uncomfortable.

Also starting a new pattern for naming characters. I don’t think it’ll be totally obvious with this one but… next one? Maybe. Any I create after mid July will use this.

・┆✦ʚ♡ɞ✦ ┆・
